description: Host-facing or host-networked service exposure policy. Every manifest with an external port or host network entry must be listed here.

ape.notes: Policy/audit service for agent tool calls; keep local unless explicitly publishing an agent control surface.

brave-search.notes: Bridges to a paid upstream API key; exposure risks quota/key abuse.

comfyui.notes: Optional image-generation UI; should stay localhost/private by default.

ods-proxy.notes: Optional web gateway for LAN/mDNS routing.

embeddings.notes: Embedding model API; keep private unless a client explicitly needs it.

hermes.notes: Must remain internal-only; users enter through hermes-proxy.

hermes-proxy.notes: Caddy forward_auth gate in front of Hermes.

langfuse.notes: May contain prompts, traces, and evaluation data.

litellm.notes: Must enforce LITELLM_MASTER_KEY when used as a gateway.

n8n.notes: Workflow automation can call local and external services.

openclaw.notes: Deprecated legacy agent. Must remain optional and token-gated.

perplexica.notes: Deep research UI backed by search and local inference.

privacy-shield.notes: PII restoration/proxy surface; auth protects re-identification paths.

qdrant.notes: Vector database can contain private embeddings and metadata.

searxng.notes: Metasearch service; exposure can leak query history.

tailscale.notes: Remote access path; host networking is intentional and must stay explicit.

token-spy.notes: Usage/trace data can reveal prompts and model behavior.

whisper.notes: Speech-to-text model API; audio may be sensitive.
